The '''Botor Income Ministry''' was a ministry of the [[Botor Enclave/Legends|Botor Enclave]]. [[Kane Griggs]] worked there between the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].
